summary.key_theme: Amazon 在 AI 基礎設施與投資領域展現強勁吸引力，但面臨監管訴訟、股東治理壓力以及知名投資機構減持的負面挑戰。

bullish.title: Wall Street Billionaires Make Amazon Their Top AI Trade
bullish.reason: Bill Ackman 與 David Tepper 等頂級投資人在 Q1 大幅增持 Amazon，顯示華爾街將其視為 AI 領域的核心標的。

bullish.title: Here is why Amazon (AMZN) Is Among the Top Stocks to Benefit From AI
bullish.reason: Amazon 不僅開發自有 AI 技術，其雲端基礎設施優勢使其成為 AI 浪潮下的長期受益者。

bullish.title: Here’s Why Amazon (AMZN) Might Be the Ultimate Hard-Asset and AI Infrastructure Stock
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Amazon 兼具實體資產與 AI 基礎設施的雙重優勢，在科技巨頭中定位獨特。

bullish.title: Market Chatter: Anthropic Nears $30 Billion Funding Deal at $900 Billion Valuation
bullish.reason: 作為 Anthropic 的重要投資者，其估值提升將直接增厚 Amazon 的投資組合價值。

bullish.title: Delivery Divergence: Why DoorDash Is Down 30% This Year but Amazon Is Up 14%
bullish.reason: 透過與 DoorDash 的績效對比，凸顯 Amazon 在物流與電商領域的強勁競爭力與股價韌性。

bullish.title: Amazon Holds Breakout Above $252
bullish.reason: 技術面顯示股價維持在關鍵突破點位之上，短期走勢強勁。

bullish.title: How The Globalstar (GSAT) Story Is Evolving With The Amazon Deal And Spectrum Rethink
bullish.reason: 與 Globalstar 的合作持續深化，有助於擴展 Amazon 的通訊與物流網路佈局。

bearish.title: Berkshire Hathaway sells remainder of Amazon stake
bearish.reason: Berkshire Hathaway 清倉 Amazon 持股，此舉可能引發市場對公司長期成長動能的疑慮（彙整了多篇關於 Buffett 減持的報導）。

bearish.title: Amazon accused of keeping hundreds of millions in tariff costs to curry favor with Trump administration
bearish.reason: 面臨集體訴訟，指控公司未退還關稅成本，涉及金額龐大且具政治敏感性。

bearish.title: Amazon AI Governance Backlash Puts Spotlight On Valuation And Risk Outlook
bearish.reason: 投資人發起投票反對董事會成員，反映對 AI 治理與公司風險控管的擔憂。

bearish.title: Trade Tracker: Bill Baruch trims Amazon and Alphabet
bearish.reason: 知名投資人減持部位，顯示部分市場參與者開始獲利了結。

bearish.title: RDDT vs. AMZN: Which Digital Advertising Stock Is a Better Buy?
bearish.reason: Reddit 在廣告營收成長率上超越 Amazon，顯示在數位廣告市場面臨新興平台的競爭壓力。

bearish.title: Market Chatter: Amazon-backed Anthropic Proposed $1.5 Billion Copyright Settlement Evaluated by US Judge
bearish.reason: 雖然是和解，但涉及版權訴訟的賠償金額仍對其投資的 AI 業務構成潛在成本壓力。

bearish.title: Walmart and Amazon race to win over rural America with speedier deliveries
bearish.reason: 與 Walmart 在農村市場的激烈競爭，可能導致物流成本上升並壓縮利潤空間。

neutral.title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) is a Trending Stock
neutral.reason: 僅為一般性市場關注度分析，未提供具體利多或利空訊息。

neutral.title: TJX now second to Amazon as 'most disruptive force in retail'
neutral.reason: 僅為產業地位的比較評論，對股價無直接影響。
